member.summary: Gets the account details for the authenticated user.

member.summary: Updates the profile details for the authenticated user.

member.summary: Changes the password for the authenticated user.

member.summary: Submit a new claim

member.summary: Save a claim as a draft (skips complex validations)

member.summary: Get claim by ID
